import sys

n, m = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
floors = [0] * 101
for _ in range(m):
    k, f = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
    floors[f] += 1

if n == 1:
    print(1)
elif n <= sum(floors):
    curr_floor = 0
    for i in range(1, 101):
        curr_floor += floors[i]
        if n <= curr_floor:
            print(i)
            break
else:
    print(-1)
